description: The library director needs you to set up restricted content areas on the WordPress site. Create a password-protected page titled 'Staff Resources Portal' using the password 'LibAccess2024!' and include the content: 'Welcome to the Library Staff Resources Portal. This page contains links and documents for authorized library staff only.' Change the visibility of the existing post 'Getting Started with WordPress' to Private and update the status of the post '10 Essential WordPress Plugins Every Site Needs' to Draft. Create a private page titled 'Internal: Collection Development Policy' with the content: 'This policy governs the acquisition, evaluation, and deaccessioning of materials in the university library collection.' Finally, create a public page titled 'Accessing Restricted Resources' containing the text: 'Some resources on this site are restricted to library staff. Password-protected pages require a staff access code. Contact the library director for access credentials.' Use the exact titles, passwords, and content strings as specified.

metadata.staff_portal_content_keyword: Welcome to the Library Staff Resources Portal
